creator: r.s.a.vandomburg@nedforce.nl
text:
My primary e-mail address has changed. This updates the needle port that I maintain accordingly.

While we're there, also remove the superfluous FETCH_CMD.

Fix: -MAINTAINER=    r.s.a.vandomburg@student.utwente.nl
+MAINTAINER=    r.s.a.vandomburg@nedforce.nl
 COMMENT=       Dependency-injection/inversion-of-control container
-
-FETCH_CMD=     /usr/bin/fetch -Rr

 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 .include "${PORTSDIR}/devel/ruby-gems/Makefile.common"


- Roderick van Domburg
-r.s.a.vandomburg@student.utwente.nl
+r.s.a.vandomburg@nedforce.nl--uCLZQcaVgSGWjXXLUG3nW7zoB7sb7Uj0mVtkgMLBnPNJG8re
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -ru /usr/ports/devel/rubygem-needle/Makefile rubygem-needle/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/devel/rubygem-needle/Makefile    Thu Feb  8 18:20:02 2007
+++ rubygem-needle/Makefile     Tue Jun 26 12:47:48 2007
@@ -11,10 +11,8 @@
 MASTER_SITES=  ${MASTER_SITE_RUBYFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=    ${PORTNAME}
